headline: Jim Cramer Says “Conagra’s Been a Nightmare of a Stock”
summary: Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE:CAG) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer evaluated, along with the fragile food market. Cramer highlighted the company’s woes, as he said: Conagra’s been a nightmare of a stock, even as the company’s put together a terrific family of brands, navigated a tough situation as best it could. At the same […]
